differential_diagnoses: Septic emboli resulting from S. aureus bacteremia
next_steps: Urgent CT angiography of the chest/abdomen with contrast to assess aortic morphology and rule out progression of pseudoaneurysm
Transesophageal echocardiography to evaluate for vegetation and valvular involvement
Continuous cardiac telemetry and frequent monitoring of blood pressure
Infectious disease consultation to optimize antibiotic regimen for MSSA bacteremia
Vascular surgery consultation for potential definitive intervention of aortic pathology
